trips.title: Saudi Arabia Ilm & Umrah Trip 2026
trips.meta: ✈️ Medina & Mecca | 12 Days | Coordinated by USA & UK Branches
trips.description: An intensive spiritual journey combining the sacred Umrah pilgrimage with daily interactive Quran study circles, Seerah lectures, and historical tours of key Islamic sites.

upcoming.title: Events 2026
